summary: Bollinger squeeze breakout workflow with MACD confirmation, StochRSI timing, ADX filter, and volume confirmation.
core_logic: Detect Bollinger bandwidth contraction and wait for squeeze expansion.
Use MACD histogram direction to validate breakout momentum.
Use a timing oscillator such as StochRSI to refine entry timing.
Gate trades with ADX and volume confirmation.
recommended_next_step: Use this packaged case to drive a future dedicated squeeze plugin, or treat it as a factor bundle layered on top of existing Bollinger, MACD, and ADX signals.
